commit.message:
Fix pivoting-agent lint: put search_skills/list_skills on same line as "do not"

The lint test checks per-line for search_skills()/list_skills() references
and only exempts lines containing "do not" or "never call". The prohibition
was split across two lines, so the line with the function names didn't match.

commit.message:
V1 fallback: INSERT rows for all dates covered by rate rules

Previously the fallback had separate UPDATE (for existing rows) and
INSERT (for zero-row rooms) paths. Rooms like Villa Loupa had a few V2
rows with prices, so they hit the UPDATE path which only touched NULL
prices — missing dates were never created. Now uses a single unified
path: INSERT ON CONFLICT for every date in rate rules, preserving
existing V2/PriceLabs prices with COALESCE.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Global fix: write price column in all room_availability sync paths

Every adapter (Beds24, Calry, Smoobu, Hostfully, Hostaway, Elevate)
was writing cm_price but not the price column. Guest-facing code reads
price, so all availability rows had NULL prices for guests. Fixed all
~40 INSERT/UPDATE statements across all sync paths (manual, cron,
connection-level, admin full pricing, linked rooms, V1 fallback).

Also backfilled 1,613 rows for account 220.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

The Anthropic SDK dropped `betas` as a kwarg on `messages.create()`;
prompt caching via cache_control is now GA. Removing the argument
restores classification and exposure mapping.

commit.message:
Feat: route map preview in admin trail editor

Shows the trail route on an interactive OpenStreetMap in the Route card.
Green dot = start, red dot = end. Route auto-updates after GPX upload.

Implementation:
- Migration 030: get_trail_route(uuid) RPC returns ST_AsGeoJSON so the
  admin panel can read coordinates (PostgREST returns geometry as raw WKB)
- RouteMap client component using react-leaflet (dynamic import, SSR off)
- getTrailDetail now fetches route GeoJSON in parallel
- After GPX upload, refreshes the map with the new route

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(ci): fix GitHub Actions workflow and cross-compilation support

- Change macos-13 to macos-13-xlarge for x64 builds
- Add fail-fast: false to continue building other platforms on failure
- Add BUN_TARGET environment variable for cross-compilation
- Update build-all.sh to support --target flag
- Update package.sh to accept platform parameter
- Add --frozen-lockfile to bun install for reproducible builds
- Improve server detection in cli.ts with HTTP reachability check

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix dedup fustella: per fase_catalogo, non per reparto

FUSTBOBST75X106 e FUSTBOBSTRILIEVI sono operazioni diverse
(fustellatura vs rilievo) ma nello stesso reparto 'fustella piana'.
Il dedup per reparto le trattava come duplicati, impedendo la
creazione di FUSTBOBSTRILIEVI. Ora dedup per fase_catalogo.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(cbor): Byron era unified API adapters (#336)

* feat(cbor): add Byron era unified API adapters and base58 address encoding

Introduce adapter records (ByronTransactionBodyAdapter, ByronTransactionOutputAdapter)
that wrap Byron CBOR types into the era-agnostic TransactionBody/TransactionOutput
hierarchies, enabling Byron blocks to flow through the same extension methods as
Shelley+ eras. Add ByronTxIn decoding, Byron address base58 encode/decode via
SimpleBase, and comprehensive adapter tests (19 tests covering all 8 Byron test blocks).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(cbor): prevent double tag-24 wrapping in CborEncodedValue serialization

CborEncodedValue.Value already contains the full tag-24 envelope from
deserialization, but the write path was adding another tag-24 around it.
Write the raw bytes directly instead. Add Pallas-parity Byron address
tests (base58 roundtrip, CRC32 payload verification) using the same
test vectors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(cbor): handle non-zero Byron TxIn variants and minor cleanups

Add TryToTransactionInput() for safe handling of Byron TxIn variant != 0
(opaque data, not spending inputs). Update TransactionBodyExtensions to
filter unsupported variants. Remove redundant generic type args in
CborSerializer, ChannelBuffer, and shorten namespace qualifiers in
TransactionBuilderExtensions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
perf: retirer losers chroniques + TP 2.5→3.0

Backtest 1 an validé :
  Avant : +1.0% moyen, 15/20 profitables, pire -3.1%
  Après : +1.9% moyen, 15/16 profitables, pire -0.2%

Retraits justifiés par data :
  - AMZNx/EUR : PF=0.07 (catastrophique sur 1 et 3 ans)
  - TSLAx/EUR : WR=20%, rendement négatif, volatilité Musk
  - LINK/EUR  : PF<1 systématiquement
  - AVAX/EUR  : PF<1 systématiquement

TP ratio 2.5→3.0 : +0.5-1% sur AVGO, NVDA, GOOG, MSFT
SYMBOLS : 20 → 16 (5 crypto + 11 xStocks)

v0.2.0: Milvus backend, UDS pipeline, embed-svc, hook-shim

Major architectural changes:
- Replace MeiliSearch with Milvus for vector + scalar search
- Replace HTTP forwarding with UDS framed wire protocol
- Add hook-shim (Rust) for low-latency per-event hook handling
- Add hook-client daemon mode with connection pooling
- Add embed-svc (Rust) for 384-dim text embeddings (all-MiniLM-L6-v2)
- Add hooks-monitor as inline code (was submodule)
- Add pub/sub server for event broadcasting to subscribers
- Add buffered store with ring buffer for Milvus resilience
- Add hooks-mcp with 11 MCP tools (8 scalar + 3 vector-powered)
- Add shared/ packages (config, hookevt, filecache, uds)
- Add scripts/ for start/stop/setup automation

feat(docs): DOOM-style 8-bit BGM sequencer

Replace ambient drone with a proper chiptune sequencer:
- BPM 168, E Phrygian, 8-bar loop (64 eighth-note steps)
- Lead: square wave → 8-bit clipper (waveshaper)
  E1M1-inspired riff: E4 E4 E4 D4 E4... over 2 sections
- Bass: sawtooth, driving pedal-tone pattern with movement
- Percussion: procedural kick (sine freq sweep 105→28Hz),
  snare (noise+tone), hi-hat (noise HP filter)
  Double-kick on beat 1+, snare on 2&4, 8th-note hats
- Look-ahead scheduling (loop re-queues 250ms before end)
- Fade-in 1.8s, fade-out 0.9s on toggle

commit.message:
fix: Add WhatsApp automation kill-switch, dedup tracking, and 24h window checks

Automations were sending repeat freeform messages every 5 minutes to stale leads
outside the 24h WhatsApp window, causing Error 63015 and unnecessary Twilio charges.

- Add master toggle + per-automation toggles via appSettings (OFF by default)
- Add dedup columns: leads.automationReminderSentAt, leads.automationRecoverySentAt,
  personalizedQuotes.reminderSentAt, personalizedQuotes.followupSentAt
- Add canSendFreeform() 24h window check before all freeform sends
- Guard all 4 broken automations with dedup + window check
- Add GET/PUT /api/settings/automations API routes

- Updated CSS variables: --zapi-lime/purple → --seeta-lime/purple

Backend Changes:
- package.json: zapi-backend → seeta-backend
- src/models/Business.js: zapiId field → seetaId field
- src/server.js: Updated startup and running logs
- src/services/ai.service.js: Updated AI assistant context
- src/routes/webhook.routes.js: zapiIdMatch → seetaIdMatch

Frontend Changes:
- index.html: Updated page title
- Components: Logo, Navbar, Footer rebranded
- Pages: Landing, Dashboard, AdminDashboard, WhySeeta updated
- Routes: /why-zapi → /why-seeta

Configuration:
- render.yaml: Service name zapi → seeta

commit.message:
Add two-stage table-first retrieval to fix wrong variable selection

Stage 1: embed the user's full question against 236 table-level embeddings
to find the most relevant tables first. Stage 2: restrict variable search
to variables from those tables, with a guaranteed MIN_PER_TABLE=3 floor.

Fixes the "ask about snus → get skolkning" bug: previously the per-topic
decomposition of compound queries ("flickor åk9 snusat") lost compound
context, and generic CAN-234 adult-snus variable names outscored the
correct CAN-239 youth-snus variables. With table-first filtering,
CAN-239 t37 ("Andelen elever som snusat, åk9") is correctly identified.

Root-cause fix for the guaranteed-variable cut-off bug: the [:top_k]
slice in semantic_search_results was silently dropping the last tables'
guaranteed variables when N_allowed_tables × MIN_PER_TABLE > top_k.
Fixed by sorting guaranteed entries globally by score and removing the
final [:top_k] slice in the table-filtered path.

New files:
- build_table_embeddings.py   build the 236-entry table index
- table_catalog.json          table metadata (committed for deployment)

Note: table_embeddings.npz is large (~1.4 MB float32 array) and is NOT
committed; run `python build_table_embeddings.py` once after checkout.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
